title: gentiana thunbergii
intro: Gentiana thunbergii, also known as Japanese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gentiana thunbergii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Gentiana thunbergii is commonly prepared as a tea or decoction, and its roots and rhizomes are also used in herbal preparations to make tonics and extracts.
